actionable_feedback: Produce the required output.txt summarizing the plan, key weekly allocations, and KPI rollup (total costs, weekly misses/backlog, expedite usage) for both MRB-denied and MRB-approved scenarios, plus the EV overlay.
Add a visible per-week mass-balance audit in the workbook (Beg Inv + Releases - Shipments = End Inv) with red/green checks per cohort and total; mirror a condensed version in the memo/output.txt.

Create a Traceability Ledger sheet that tracks the three cohorts (clean, missing-chart, SD-44), including coupon initiation/completion timing, ALT-B qualification consumption (4 destructive), and cohort-specific eligibility gates (e.g., no AOG from missing-chart; SD-44 confined to cert until MRB effective in week 3).

Provide side-by-side scenario tables (MRB-denied vs MRB-approved) showing week-by-week shipments/backlog by channel (AOG/OEM/Cert), penalties, and total costs; include a simple EV overlay using the stated MRB approval probability.

Add a sensitivity/breakeven section: (a) Qualify ALT-B now vs. never, with cost deltas and OEM line-stop exposure, and (b) expedite NDT sensitivity for weeks 3-6 to confirm the optimal single-week expedite choice.
Include an Executive Summary sheet with linked KPIs (weekly misses, penalty rollups, ALT-B/coupon/expedite costs, total costs per scenario, EV) and a data dictionary of key inputs/assumptions.

Expose gating and capacity constraints directly in the workbook (named ranges and readable formulas): in-house HT cap weeks 1-3, ALT-B net availability week 3 onwards, final inspection/NDT capacity and expedite increments.

Add guardrails (data validation or boolean checks) preventing disallowed flows (e.g., AOG from missing-chart) and shipments of SD-44 to OEM/AOG before MRB approval; show triggered warnings if violated.
Echo critical checks in the memo (or an appendix) so graders/verifiers can validate logic even when spreadsheet previews are constrained (e.g., missing openpyxl).

feedback_summary: Strong, compliant plan and artifacts; grading passed with a high score. However, there is a deliverable mismatch (missing required output.txt), and several transparency/auditability gaps reduce confidence: no explicit per-week mass-balance checks, no traceability ledger by cohort, limited scenario/sensitivity visibility (ALT-B breakeven and expedite-week sensitivity), and no single-page executive KPI rollup. Workbook formulas were not verifiable in-line by the grader due to preview limitations; surfacing checks in the memo and a minimal text deliverable will harden evidence.

limitations_noted_by_grader: Full formula auditing of the XLSX not performed inline.
Week-by-week mass balance and capacity caps inferred from memo.
verifier_warnings: Deterministic contract inconsistency noted but passed with warnings.
